allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: refocus menu and onboarding on caisse, recouvrement, rapports and team management

Align the WhatsApp/Telegram menu, onboarding flow and frontend dashboard
with the core SikaFlow offering: cash register \(caisse\), debt recovery
\(recouvrement\), reports and organization management.

Backend:
- Restructure help menu into 3 sections: Caisse, Recouvrement, Gestion & Rapports
- Remove Billetterie section and INCIDENT_COMPLIANCE feature check
- Add TRACK_FIRST_DEBT onboarding step \(enum, value-object, seeder, event listener\)
- Emit debt.created event from DebtHandler on successful add debt/credit
- Update onboarding welcome message with debt recovery example

Frontend:
- Replace Evenements nav with Recouvrement \(HandCoins icon\)
- Replace Billets Vendus stat with Creances en cours
- Replace Scanner button with Nouvelle Creance
- Replace SCAN activity with DEBT activity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
merge: resolve conflicts with main \(agent orchestrator pattern\)

Take main''s HelpHandler refactor using AgentOrchestratorService and
GetOrganizationFeaturesUseCase instead of interactive list menus.
The menu refocusing \(caisse/recouvrement\) is now driven by
FEATURE_DESCRIPTIONS and dynamic subscription features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
